pageDescription: Minimal read-only admin page for the protected config route. Provide an admin token at runtime, load the current server config, and inspect what the public app is using.
usageText: Local development only needs plain HTTP on localhost. For non-local access the route expects HTTPS and a valid admin token.
outputPlaceholder: Load the protected config to inspect it here.
statusWaitingMessage: The page itself is public, but the config route stays protected and deny-by-default.
statusTokenRequiredMessage: Enter an admin token before loading the protected config.
statusTokenClearedMessage: Stored session token was removed from the admin page.
